bigquery_options.description: Specifies advanced options for sinks exporting logs to BigQuery, such as partitioning or clustering settings.

description.description: Provides a brief explanation of the sink's purpose or functionality within the logging system.

destination.description: Specifies the destination for the logging sink, such as a Cloud Storage bucket, BigQuery dataset, or Pub/Sub topic. Must follow the appropriate format for the chosen destination type.

disabled.description: Determines whether the folder sink is disabled; set to true to disable logging for the sink.

exclusions.description: Defines log entry exclusion filters for the sink, specifying criteria to exclude certain log entries from being exported.

filter.description: Defines the filter expression used to determine which log entries to include in the sink, following the Logging query language syntax.

folder.description: Specifies the folder ID where the logging sink will be created. Must be in the format "folders/{folder_id}".

include_children.description: Specifies whether to include logs from child resources of the folder in the sink.

intercept_children.description: Determines whether log entries from child resources are included in the sink; set to true to enable inclusion.

name.description: Unique identifier for the logging sink, must be compliant with Google Cloud naming conventions.
